name: Sandik
description: Sandik is an exceptionally clean and modern Dekton surface featuring an off-white base with very subtle light grey and cream undertones. Its minimalist pattern and uniform texture, accented by delicate veining, make it an ideal choice for bright and contemporary architectural spaces.

name: Trevi
description: Trevi features a soft, light grey and cream background accented by delicate, horizontal taupe veining. This Dekton surface perfectly captures the classic, linear elegance of natural travertine while offering modern durability.

name: Nebu
description: Nebu is a sophisticated Dekton surface that masterfully replicates the look of natural travertine with its warm blend of light beige, cream, and sand hues. The design is defined by gentle horizontal linear veining and subtle textural details that evoke sedimentary rock formations.

name: Polar
description: Polar is an elegant, off-white Dekton surface featuring a fine-grained texture punctuated by subtle beige and light grey specks. Its minimalist aesthetic is enhanced by delicate, organic fissures, offering a versatile and modern finish for any interior space.

name: Nara
description: Nara is a serene surface characterized by its creamy white and pale beige background, elegantly interrupted by gentle wave-like veining and subtle stratification. The fine texture and light gray undertones create a sophisticated, horizontal flow reminiscent of natural quartzite.

name: Dekton Trilium
description: Dekton Trilium showcases a deep charcoal background accented by subtle mottling and light ash grey undertones for a rich, sophisticated look. Prominent crisp white veining strikes across the surface, delivering a powerful marble effect that elevates contemporary architectural spaces.

name: Color
description: This granite surface features a tightly packed, granular texture with a warm blend of beige, light brown, and creamy white minerals. Dark charcoal flecks are evenly distributed throughout, creating a highly uniform and durable appearance suitable for versatile design applications.

name: Color 1
description: Color 1 Granite features a consistently speckled pattern characterized by a beautiful mix of warm beige, taupe, and light gray tones accented by fine charcoal flecks. Its uniform, fine-grained texture makes it a versatile and highly durable choice for both traditional and contemporary design applications.

name: Color 2
description: Color 2 is a classic light grey granite defined by its tightly packed, evenly distributed speckles of grey, white, and charcoal minerals. The fine-grained and highly uniform texture provides a highly consistent appearance that is exceptionally versatile for a wide range of interior and exterior design projects.

name: Color 3
description: Color 3 is a classic grey granite characterized by a highly uniform, finely speckled pattern of white, light grey, and dark mineral deposits. Its consistent granular texture and lack of distinct veining make it a versatile and durable choice for a wide variety of architectural and design applications.

name: Color 4
description: Color 4 is a highly consistent granite featuring a dense, granular texture with a finely speckled pattern. It presents a harmonious blend of light grey, warm beige, and taupe with subtle muted blue-grey undertones, making it ideal for uniformly textured surfaces.

name: Color 5
description: Color 5 is a highly consistent granite defined by its extremely fine-grained, uniformly speckled texture with no prominent veining. The complex aggregate gently blends lavender-grey, beige, and subtle charcoal flecks to create a versatile and tranquil surface.

name: Color 6
description: Color 6 is a fine-grained granite featuring a tightly packed, speckled pattern of blue-grey, taupe, and subtle light beige tones. Its homogeneous texture and cool, intricate granular structure make it a versatile choice for contemporary architectural surfaces.

name: Color 7
description: Color 7 is a warm and earthy granite characterized by a dense, fine-grained blend of terracotta and rust-brown hues. The stone's surface is uniformly peppered with small dark brown and tan speckles, creating a consistent and visually rich granular texture.

name: Granite 001A
description: Granite 001A features a classic, densely packed speckled pattern with a harmonious blend of warm beige, tan, and charcoal grey minerals. This medium-grained stone offers a highly uniform texture, making it a highly versatile and durable choice for various architectural applications.

name: Granite 001A Color
description: This granite features a consistent, fine-grained speckled pattern combining warm beige, taupe, and subtle charcoal flecks. Its uniform texture and earthy color palette make it a versatile choice for both classic and contemporary architectural applications.

name: Granite 001B
description: Granite 001B is a classic stone featuring a warm blend of beige, tan, and light grey beautifully contrasted by intricate charcoal flecks. Its traditional speckled, medium-grained texture provides a uniform and versatile aesthetic suitable for both traditional and modern architectural designs.

name: Granite 001B Color
description: Granite 001B Color features a classic, finely speckled texture dominated by warm tan, grey, and subtle dark brown minerals. This uniform, tight-grained structure provides a consistent and versatile appearance suitable for a variety of traditional and modern applications.

name: Granite 002A
description: Granite 002A features a classic, uniform speckled pattern with a light grey and off-white base punctuated by dense charcoal and black minerals. Its fine-to-medium grained texture offers a consistent and versatile surface ideal for traditional and modern applications alike.

name: Granite 002A
description: Granite 002A is a classic natural stone characterized by its densely speckled salt-and-pepper appearance. The fine-grained texture features a balanced blend of light grey, white, and charcoal flecks that offer a versatile and highly uniform surface.

name: Granite002B
description: Granite002B is a classic light grey granite characterized by a dense, even distribution of dark grey and black speckling. Its fine-grained, granular texture provides a consistent and durable surface suitable for a wide range of applications.

name: Granite 002B
description: Granite 002B is a classic salt-and-pepper style granite featuring a tightly packed, speckled composition of white, gray, and black minerals. Its uniform, fine-grained texture makes it a highly consistent and versatile choice for both contemporary and traditional design applications.

name: Granite 003A
description: Granite 003A is a classic light-toned stone featuring a dense, granular matrix of rust, tan, and charcoal flecks set against a soft white and light grey background. Its fine-grained texture and uniform speckled pattern provide a versatile and elegant surface for diverse architectural applications.

name: Granite 003A
description: Granite 003A features a densely packed, fine-grained surface characterized by a dynamic interplay of light grey, muted blue-grey, and rust-brown mineral deposits. This highly speckled granite offers a versatile and textured appearance, making it an excellent choice for surfaces requiring a complex yet balanced visual profile.

name: Granite 005 A
description: Granite 005 A is a fine-grained granite featuring a predominantly light grey base densely speckled with blue and tan flecks. Its consistent, uniform texture and cool undertones make it a versatile choice for a clean, modern aesthetic.

name: Granite 005A
description: Granite 005A is a highly textured, fine-grained stone featuring a dense, speckled distribution of slate blue, mauve, and beige particulates. Its uniform, tightly packed granular structure offers a cohesive and subtly colorful surface suitable for diverse architectural applications.

name: Granite 005B
description: Granite 005B presents a densely speckled surface characterized by a light grey and beige background interwoven with fine blue and brown flecks. This fine-grained granite offers a highly consistent and uniform pattern, making it a versatile choice for a wide array of architectural applications.

name: Granite 005B
description: Granite 005B features a tightly packed, uniform speckled pattern blending slate blue, taupe, and muted grey minerals. Its fine-grained, granular texture provides a consistent and durable surface without distinct veining, making it ideal for versatile design applications.

name: Granite 006A
description: Granite 006A is a warm, bronze-toned granite with a finely speckled texture. The consistent distribution of dark charcoal flecks against a caramel brown background provides a uniformly textured surface suitable for versatile applications.

name: Granite 006A 2K Color
description: Granite 006A is a warm, earthy granite featuring a predominantly terracotta red base peppered with rust orange and dark brown specks. Its fine-grained, evenly distributed pattern creates a consistent and inviting surface suitable for both traditional and contemporary designs.

name: Granite Tile 02 Diff
description: This granite surface features a structured geometric grid, consisting of earthy brown square tiles framed by charcoal grey rectangular bands. Small, speckled grey square accents at the intersections highlight the fine-grained, matte texture of the stone.

name: Granite Tile 02
description: This surface showcases a precise geometric layout featuring large square granite tiles separated by intersecting linear bands and small corner accents. The subtle speckled texture across the light grey stone conveys a classic, structured aesthetic ideal for commercial or residential installations.

name: Granite Tile 03 Diff 2K
description: This tile features a warm taupe and chocolate brown granite with a consistent, medium-grained speckled texture. Dark charcoal flecks are evenly distributed throughout, creating a harmonious and earthy surface suitable for diverse applications.

name: Granite Tile 03
description: This surface presents a clean layout of large, light grey granite tiles separated by fine grout lines. The stone exhibits a uniform, fine-grained texture with very subtle mottling, making it ideal for sleek, modern architectural applications.

name: Granite Tile 04 Diff 2k
description: This image features a collection of square granite tiles arranged in a uniform grid. The stone exhibits a medium brown to taupe color base with fine, subtle grey speckles spread evenly across the surface.

name: Granite Tile 04
description: This structural granite arrangement features a precise square tile layout with neatly defined grout lines. Subtle shading across the tiles indicates gentle surface depth, offering a clean and modern aesthetic suitable for expansive architectural cladding.

name: Granite Tile
description: Granite Tile features a consistent, dark charcoal grey palette arranged in a classic square tile grid pattern. The surface exhibits a subtle directional texture and matte finish, providing a sleek and modern aesthetic suitable for architectural applications.

name: Granite Tile Disp 2k
description: This image displays a grid of square granite tiles characterized by a subtle, mottled grayscale texture. The varying shades of light to medium gray across the tiles suggest slight differences in surface depth and finish, typical of a displacement or bump map for 3D rendering.

name: Granite Wall
description: This surface features a structured wall pattern composed of speckled granite blocks in warm earthy brown and rust tones. The rough-hewn rectangular stones are separated by visible white mortar lines, highlighting the granular texture and natural variation inherent to the material.

name: Granite Wall Disp 2k
description: Granite Wall Disp 2k displays a pattern of horizontal blocks in varying shades of light to medium grey, accented by darker lines defining the edges. The subtle texture and slight vertical joints give it a realistic, structured appearance suitable for architectural applications.

name: Granite001A 2K Jpg Displacement
description: This image showcases a finely grained granite texture in medium grey tones, creating a highly uniform and consistent appearance. The subtle speckling and very fine texture are typical of displacement maps designed to add depth to 3D materials without introducing pronounced patterns.

name: Granite 001A Normal DX
description: This image serves as a tangent-space normal map for a 3D granite material, utilizing a lavender-blue color palette to encode subtle surface geometry and elevation. The predominantly uniform and smooth color field indicates a finely polished, fine-grained stone finish with minimal deep texturing or heavy natural veining.

name: Granite 001A Normal
description: This image is a flat, uniform normal map associated with a Granite 001A material, designed for 3D texture rendering. Its solid periwinkle blue color indicates a perfectly smooth, highly polished stone surface devoid of any topographical variations or bumps.

name: Granite Roughness Map
description: This image represents a roughness map for a granite surface, characterized by a uniform, finely speckled texture that translates to micro-variations in glossiness when rendered. The pitch black and dark charcoal tones indicate areas of varying microscopic roughness, essential for creating realistic, light-scattering stone materials.

name: Granite 001B Displacement
description: Granite 001B Displacement presents a highly uniform, fine-grained surface characterized by a dense speckled pattern typical of classic granite structures. This monochromatic map features a tightly packed distribution of micro-crystalline forms, making it ideal for generating realistic textural depth.

name: Granite001B
